name: Creamy Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, sauté onions in butter.
2. Add broth, pepper, thyme, and salt (if desired); bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Stir flour into remaining milk until smooth; add to soup.
5. Bring to a boil; boil and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.
Yield: 6 servings (1 1/2 quarts).
